title: Fireblocks Vault Account
description: A Fireblocks Vault account groups one or more asset wallets under a single organizational unit (e.g. desk, customer, fund). Vaults are the root container for keys, balances, and transactions inside a Fireblocks workspace.

id.description: The unique Fireblocks-assigned identifier of the vault account.

name.description: Human-readable name of the vault account.

hiddenOnUI.description: If true, the vault is hidden from the Fireblocks Console UI but remains accessible via API.

customerRefId.description: Optional customer-defined reference identifier (e.g. internal customer ID) attached to the vault.

autoFuel.description: If true, Fireblocks will auto-fuel gas for transactions originating from this vault using the configured Gas Station.

assets.description: List of asset wallets held inside the vault.

id.description: Fireblocks asset identifier (e.g. BTC, ETH, USDC).

total.description: Total balance of the asset held in the vault.

lockedAmount.description: Amount currently locked by pending transactions.

available.description: Amount available to spend after subtracting locked and pending amounts.

pending.description: Amount pending confirmation from the network.

frozen.description: Amount frozen by AML / compliance screening.

staked.description: Amount currently staked via the Fireblocks Staking API.

blockHeight.description: Block height at which the balance was last updated.

blockHash.description: Block hash at which the balance was last updated.
